VAL-RUNBOOK-005.evidence: 43/43 tests pass in test_monitoring_and_postflight.py. Tests cover: dmon output parsing (TestDmonParser: 10 tests — gpu_index, power_w, gpu_temp_c, sm_util_pct, mem_util_pct, mem_clock_mhz, gpu_clock_mhz, multi-GPU filtering, empty/comments-only input), XID error parsing (TestXidErrorParser: 5 tests — detection, xid_code int field, pci_id field, no-errors case, specific codes 48/63), monitoring data collection (TestCollectMonitoringData: 6 tests — pre_snapshot with driver_version, post_snapshot, time_series non-empty, xid_errors with entries and empty case), MonitoringRunner (TestMonitoringRunner: 4 tests — COMPLETED status, timestamps, metrics keys pre_snapshot/post_snapshot/time_series/xid_errors, name='monitoring').
VAL-RUNBOOK-005.details: Source monitoring.py implements: parse_dmon_output (parses nvidia-smi dmon columns into structured entries), parse_xid_errors (regex-based XID detection from dmesg), collect_monitoring_data (combines pre/post nvidia-smi -q snapshots + dmon time-series + XID errors with subprocess fallback), and MonitoringRunner (SectionRunner returning SectionResult with COMPLETED status, timestamps, and all monitoring metrics). All assertion requirements are covered: continuous thermal/power monitoring via dmon time-series, pre/post snapshots via nvidia-smi -q parsing, and XID detection output.

VAL-RUNBOOK-006.evidence: 43/43 tests pass in test_monitoring_and_postflight.py. Tests cover: UUID consistency (TestUUIDConsistency: 4 tests — matching UUIDs pass, missing UUID fails with missing_uuids list, new UUID fails with new_uuids list, empty pre/post passes), NVLink status (TestNVLinkCheck: 3 tests — all active links pass, inactive links reported with passed=False, total_link_count field), ECC errors (TestECCCheck: 3 tests — zero errors pass, new errors detected with passed=False and non-empty new_errors, explicit passed boolean field), full post-flight collection (TestCollectPostflightChecks: 5 tests — uuid_consistency/nvlink_status/ecc_errors all present with passed fields, overall_passed=True when all pass, overall_passed=False when any fails), PostflightRunner (TestPostflightRunner: 4 tests — COMPLETED status, timestamps, metrics contain uuid_consistency/nvlink_status/ecc_errors/overall_passed, name='post-flight').
VAL-RUNBOOK-006.details: Source postflight.py implements: check_uuid_consistency (set comparison of pre/post GPU UUIDs with explicit passed/missing_uuids/new_uuids), check_nvlink_status (parses post-run nvidia-smi -q for link states with passed/total_links/active_links/inactive_links), check_ecc_errors (compares pre/post volatile ECC counters by GPU UUID with passed/new_errors), collect_postflight_checks (combines all three checks with overall_passed AND logic), and PostflightRunner (SectionRunner returning all check results as metrics). All assertion requirements covered: seal/close UUID consistency validation, post-run NVLink/ECC error status collection, and explicit pass/fail reporting.

VAL-RUNBOOK-008.evidence: 14/14 tests pass in test_manifest_and_durability.py. Tests cover: ManifestBuilder (TestManifestBuilder: 6 tests — record_produced with section/artifact/PRODUCED status, record_skipped with reason, record_missing with reason, multiple artifacts tracked, to_dict with entries/summary/produced/skipped/missing counts, build_from_sections mapping COMPLETED→produced, SKIPPED→skipped with reason, FAILED→missing with reason), ManifestRunner (TestManifestRunner: 3 tests — COMPLETED status, metrics contain entries/summary, name='manifest').
VAL-RUNBOOK-008.details: Source manifest.py implements: SECTION_ARTIFACTS dict defining expected artifacts for all 6 runbook sections (pre-flight: 5 artifacts, compute: 5, memory: 2, interconnect: 2, monitoring: 4, post-flight: 3), ManifestEntry with section/artifact/status/reason fields, ManifestBuilder.build_from_sections handling all BenchmarkStatus values (COMPLETED→produced, SKIPPED→skipped with reason, FAILED/TIMEOUT→missing with reason, PENDING→skipped with 'Section did not execute'), ManifestBuilder.to_dict producing entries list + summary counts, and ManifestRunner. All assertion requirements covered: manifest enumerates expected artifacts for all runbook sections, and missing/skipped artifacts include explicit skip/failure reasons.

VAL-RUNBOOK-009.evidence: 14/14 tests pass in test_manifest_and_durability.py. Tests cover: DurableRunOrchestrator (TestDurableRunOrchestrator: 5 tests — persists_on_normal_completion verifies output_path exists and valid JSON with matching report_id, persists_completed_sections_on_failure verifies pre-flight/compute='completed' and memory='failed' and interconnect='completed' when memory FailingSectionRunner raises, persists_on_keyboard_interrupt verifies pre-flight/compute='completed' when memory InterruptingSectionRunner raises KeyboardInterrupt, incremental_persistence verifies all sections present in report including failed ones, report_has_terminal_status_on_interruption verifies interrupted compute has status='failed' and error contains 'interrupted').
VAL-RUNBOOK-009.details: Source runner.py DurableRunOrchestrator extends RunOrchestrator: _persist_current_state writes JSON report after every section via output_path.write_text(report.model_dump_json), execute() catches KeyboardInterrupt separately (marks section FAILED with 'Run interrupted by user', sets interrupted flag, marks remaining sections as SKIPPED with 'Run interrupted before this section'), catches general Exception (marks FAILED with error message), and continues execution of remaining sections after non-interrupt failures. All assertion requirements covered: interrupted/failed runs persist previously completed phase results with terminal status in JSON report.
